name: UOB One Credit Card
perks: Up to 3.4% p.a. interest on linked UOB One Account
Up to 10% cashback on Grab, McDonald's, Shopee
welcomeBonus: Up to S$260 cash credit for new deposit customers
useCaseSummary: Best for spenders who can commit S$600–S$2,000/month and want a combined cashback and savings-account interest boost. Strongest for those who frequently use Grab, McDonald's, Shopee, or Shell.

name: UOB Absolute Cashback Card
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: Ideal for those who want a simple, no-fuss high flat-rate cashback card with no minimum spend and no cap. Best paired with another card for excluded categories.

name: UOB EVOL Card
perks: 0% FX fees worldwide — no minimum, no cap
Annual fee effectively waived with 3 txns/month
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: Great for digital-first millennials who spend heavily online and on public transport. The 0% FX fee worldwide makes it excellent for overseas travel too.

name: UOB PRVI Miles Visa Card
perks: Up to 8 mpd on Agoda/Expedia bookings
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: A solid all-round miles card with a strong overseas earn rate and travel perks. Good for frequent regional travellers who want lounge access without a premium annual fee.

name: UOB PRVI Miles World Mastercard
perks: Up to 8 mpd on Agoda/Expedia bookings
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: Same earn rates as the Visa variant but on the Mastercard network — useful for merchants that don't accept Amex or Visa. Ideal for miles collectors wanting broad acceptance.

name: UOB PRVI Miles American Express Card
welcomeBonus: 20,000 loyalty miles with S$50,000+ annual spend
useCaseSummary: Best for high spenders who want Amex-exclusive perks like airport transfers and hotel benefits on top of the PRVI Miles earn rates.

name: UOB Lady's Card
perks: 4 mpd on chosen category (up to 10 mpd with savings account)
Luxe Pay 0% instalment for purchases S$500+
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: The top pick for women who want to concentrate miles earning on a single chosen category each quarter — especially valuable for fashion or beauty spenders.

name: Lazada-UOB Card
perks: Pairs with UOB One Account for higher interest
welcomeBonus: S$200 in Lazada vouchers for new UOB cardmembers (with qualifying spend)
useCaseSummary: Perfect for Lazada/RedMart loyalists — the 20% rebate on Lazada is among the highest platform-specific rebates in Singapore.

name: OCBC 365 Credit Card
perks: 5% cashback on dining and food delivery
Fuel discounts at Caltex, Esso, Sinopec
welcomeBonus: Delsey luggage and Disney packing cubes with S$300 spend in 30 days
useCaseSummary: A versatile everyday cashback card covering dining, groceries, transport and utilities. Best for households spending S$800+ per month across multiple categories.

name: OCBC INFINITY Cashback Card
perks: 1.6% unlimited cashback — no min spend, no cap
Bonus 0.4% p.a. interest on OCBC 360 Account
welcomeBonus: De'Longhi Icona Vintage Breakfast set (S$298) or Samsonite luggage or S$200 cashback
useCaseSummary: The go-to for those who want a clean unlimited flat-rate cashback card with no hoops to jump through. Strong companion card for irregular spenders.

name: OCBC Rewards Card
perks: 15X OCBC$ at Watsons and major e-commerce platforms
welcomeBonus: Delsey luggage with S$300 spend in 30 days
useCaseSummary: Outstanding for shopping addicts — earns 4 mpd on clothing, shoes, luggage, pharmacies and department stores, making it one of the best shopping-category miles cards.

name: OCBC 90°N Mastercard
perks: VIP access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide
welcomeBonus: Up to 55,000 miles for new applicants
useCaseSummary: A flexible miles card with never-expiring miles, wide transfer partner network, and impressive lounge access at a mainstream annual fee. Great for frequent travellers.

name: OCBC 90°N Visa Card
welcomeBonus: Up to 55,000 miles for new applicants
useCaseSummary: The Visa variant of the 90°N with DragonPass lounge access and 6 mpd on Agoda. Excellent for travellers who prefer Visa acceptance worldwide.

name: OCBC VOYAGE Credit Card
perks: 15,000 bonus miles on annual fee payment
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: A premium miles card for affluent travellers who value unlimited lounge access, airport transfers, and concierge services. The 15,000 annual miles partially offsets the fee.

name: Standard Chartered Simply Cash Credit Card
perks: 1.5% unlimited cashback — no min spend, no cap
Instant Digital Credit Card via MyInfo
S$30 Caltex fuel vouchers on approval
Live The Good Life benefits at 3,000+ Asia outlets
welcomeBonus: S$710 worth of gifts: Samsonite MODUS Spinner 25" + S$100 cashback with S$800 spend in 60 days
useCaseSummary: A clean, unlimited 1.5% cashback card with no minimum spend. Best as a catch-all backup card for spend not covered by category-focused cards.

name: Standard Chartered Smart Credit Card
perks: Up to 10% at major fast food chains and Starbucks
Visa Smart Delay (lounge access during flight delays)
welcomeBonus: S$610 Samsonite luggage + S$100 cashback with S$800 spend in 60 days
useCaseSummary: Tailored for daily commuters and digital entertainment subscribers who want high cashback on Netflix, Spotify, fast food and public transport at a low annual fee.

name: Standard Chartered Journey Credit Card
perks: 3 mpd on transport, food delivery, online groceries
welcomeBonus: 30,000 miles (with annual fee) or 20,000 miles (fee waived) with S$800 spend in 60 days
useCaseSummary: Excellent for ride-hailing, food delivery and grocery miles — earns 3 mpd in these everyday categories with no minimum spend requirement.

name: Standard Chartered Visa Infinite Credit Card
perks: eCommerce purchase protection up to USD$1,000
welcomeBonus: Up to 50,000 miles with min S$2,000 spend in 60 days
useCaseSummary: A premium card for high-income travellers who spend heavily overseas and want substantial travel insurance, lounge access, and a dedicated concierge.

name: Standard Chartered Beyond Credit Card
perks: Up to 8 mpd on overseas dining (Priority Private)
welcomeBonus: Up to 200,000+ miles through combined spending and wealth activities
useCaseSummary: An ultra-premium card for Priority Banking and Priority Private clients who want the highest miles earn rate plus world-class lifestyle and travel perks.

name: Standard Chartered Rewards+ Credit Card
perks: 10X points on overseas spend (4 mpd equiv)
5X points on local dining (2 mpd equiv)
1-for-1 Cathay Cineplex Platinum Movie Suites tickets
welcomeBonus: Up to S$220 cashback and 6 months Disney+ with S$200 spend
useCaseSummary: Best for travellers who shop and dine heavily overseas, earning 4 mpd on all overseas retail and travel transactions with a low annual fee.

name: HSBC Revolution Credit Card
perks: 4 mpd on all contactless and online spend (effective 1 April 2026)
Complimentary travel insurance (Visa Signature — reinstated 1 April 2026)
welcomeBonus: Samsonite luggage (S$680 value) or S$200 cashback at S$500 spend; additional S$100 cashback at next S$500 spend
useCaseSummary: Permanent 4 mpd on contactless and online spend from 1 April 2026. Being upgraded to Visa Signature with travel insurance reinstated. No annual fee. Existing HSBC customers with SGD 50,000 Total Relationship Balance may qualify at SGD 30,000 income.

name: HSBC TravelOne Credit Card
perks: Travel insurance up to S$150,000 medical
Annual fee waived with S$25,000 annual spend
welcomeBonus: Up to 36,000 miles with S$1,000 spend in first 2 months
useCaseSummary: Best for frequent overseas travellers who want instant mile transfers and lounge access without being locked into a single airline programme.

name: HSBC Live+ Credit Card
perks: Up to 17% fuel savings at Caltex and Shell
welcomeBonus: Up to S$300 cashback or Samsonite luggage (S$680 value)
useCaseSummary: A strong lifestyle card for those who regularly spend on dining, retail shopping and entertainment — the 5% rate with S$600 min spend is easily achievable for most cardholders.

name: HSBC Advance Credit Card
welcomeBonus: Up to S$300 cashback or Samsonite luggage (S$680 value)
useCaseSummary: A solid flat-rate cashback card that rewards high spenders with 2.5% above S$2,000/month. Good for HSBC banking customers who want simplicity.

name: HSBC Premier Mastercard
perks: Up to 6.25 mpd via travel portal
welcomeBonus: Up to 88,000 KrisFlyer miles (Premier qualified customers)
useCaseSummary: The flagship card for HSBC Premier members — unlimited lounge access, generous miles earn rates, and premium travel benefits befitting affluent frequent travellers.

name: HSBC Visa Infinite Credit Card
perks: eCommerce purchase protection up to USD$1,000
welcomeBonus: None
useCaseSummary: A legacy premium card with exceptional lounge and travel protection benefits, though the earn rate is modest. Best for HSBC high-net-worth customers seeking lifestyle privileges.

name: CIMB Visa Signature
perks: 10% on online shopping, groceries, beauty & wellness
10% on pet shops and vet services
welcomeBonus: S$188 welcome gift
useCaseSummary: One of the best no-annual-fee cashback cards — earns 10% on online shopping, groceries, and beauty with no recurring fee commitment.

name: CIMB World Mastercard
perks: 2% unlimited cashback on dining, entertainment, ride-hailing
welcomeBonus: S$188 welcome gift
useCaseSummary: A premium no-fee card offering lounge access and solid cashback on dining and entertainment. Best for social spenders who hit S$1,000 monthly easily.

name: CIMB Visa Infinite
perks: 2% unlimited cashback on travel and overseas spend
welcomeBonus: S$188 cash credit
useCaseSummary: Outstanding value for high-income earners — a no-annual-fee Visa Infinite card with unlimited 2% cashback and full concierge and lounge privileges.

name: DBS Altitude Visa Signature Card
welcomeBonus: Miles upon first spend — check DBS website for current offer
useCaseSummary: A well-rounded miles card with strong online travel earn rates and never-expiring points. Ideal for travellers who book flights and hotels online frequently.

name: DBS Altitude American Express Card
perks: 3 mpd on Expedia, SIA; 10 mpd on Kaligo
American Express travel and dining perks
welcomeBonus: Miles upon first spend — check DBS website for current offer
useCaseSummary: The Amex variant of DBS Altitude with additional Amex dining and travel programme access. Best for those who want Amex exclusives alongside DBS miles.

name: DBS Live Fresh Card
perks: 5% on online spend and contactless dining/entertainment
welcomeBonus: Check DBS website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: Designed for eco-conscious millennials who spend online — 5% on online purchases and contactless dining/entertainment with a low S$600 minimum.

name: DBS yuu Card
perks: Up to 18% cash rebates at yuu partners
Bonus earn at NTUC FairPrice, Giant, Unity, Cheers
welcomeBonus: Check DBS website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: The best card for NTUC FairPrice, Giant, and Cheers shoppers — earns generous yuu Points redeemable across 150+ partner brands.

name: POSB Everyday Card
perks: Up to 10% on dining and SimplyGo
welcomeBonus: Up to S$388 cashback for new cardmembers
useCaseSummary: A practical everyday card for Singaporeans who commute via SimplyGo, dine out regularly, and shop at NTUC or online — covers most daily spending needs.

name: DBS Vantage Visa Infinite Card
welcomeBonus: Check DBS website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: DBS's premium Visa Infinite card with unlimited lounge access, airport transfers, and strong hotel booking miles for high-income frequent travellers.

name: Maybank World Mastercard
perks: 5X TREATS Points on dining, travel, entertainment
welcomeBonus: Check Maybank website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: A mid-tier miles card for Maybank customers who dine, travel, and entertain often. The unlimited Priority Pass lounge access stands out at this fee level.

name: Maybank Family & Friends Card
perks: 8% on groceries, dining, transport, online, education
welcomeBonus: Check Maybank website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: Designed for families — earns 8% across five everyday categories including groceries, dining, transport, and education with a modest S$500 minimum spend.

name: Citi Cashback Card
perks: Petrol savings up to 20.88% at Esso and Shell
welcomeBonus: Up to S$300 cashback for new cardmembers
useCaseSummary: A top pick for those who concentrate spend on dining, groceries, and petrol — 8% across all three categories with a low S$800 minimum spend.

name: Citi Cashback+ Card
perks: No minimum spend, no cashback cap
welcomeBonus: Up to S$300 cashback for new cardmembers
useCaseSummary: Citibank's simplest cashback card — flat 1.6% on everything with no conditions. Perfect as a catch-all card for miscellaneous spending.

name: Citi Rewards Card
perks: 10X Citi ThankYou Points (4 mpd equiv) on online/shopping/taxi
Transfer to KrisFlyer, Asia Miles, Flying Blue
welcomeBonus: Up to 30,000 bonus points for new cardmembers
useCaseSummary: One of the best shopping-focused miles cards — earns 4 mpd on all online shopping, retail, taxi rides and department stores with no monthly cap.

name: Citi PremierMiles Visa Card
perks: Up to 10 mpd on selected airlines and hotels via Citi portal
welcomeBonus: Up to 37,300 bonus miles for new cardmembers with qualifying spend
useCaseSummary: Citibank's flagship mid-tier miles card with never-expiring miles and boosted rates on Citi's travel portal. Suitable for frequent flyers who want flexibility.

name: Citi Prestige Card
perks: Unlimited Priority Pass lounge access for cardholder
welcomeBonus: Up to 62,500 Citi ThankYou Points for new cardmembers
useCaseSummary: A premium travel card for frequent hotel stayers and golfers — the 4th night free hotel benefit alone can easily exceed the annual fee for those who travel often.

name: American Express True Cashback Card
perks: 1.5% unlimited cashback on all eligible spend
No minimum spend, no cashback cap
3% cashback in first 6 months (up to S$5,000 spend)
welcomeBonus: 3% cashback in first 6 months on up to S$5,000 spend (worth up to S$150)
useCaseSummary: Amex's simplest unlimited cashback card with a generous first-6-months bonus rate. Great for those who want flat-rate rewards on all Amex-accepted spend.

name: American Express Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer Credit Card
perks: 1.1 mpd base (KrisFlyer miles direct, no conversion)
2 mpd on SIA, SilkAir, Scoot purchases
3.1 mpd on eligible dining with KrisFlyer Dining Programme
No miles conversion fee — direct KrisFlyer credit
welcomeBonus: 5,000 KrisFlyer miles upon card approval and first spend
useCaseSummary: Ideal for KrisFlyer loyalists who want miles credited directly without conversion fees. Best for SIA brand shoppers and frequent SQ flyers.

name: American Express Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer Ascend Credit Card
perks: Direct KrisFlyer credit — no conversion fee
Complimentary night stay at participating hotels
welcomeBonus: 15,000 KrisFlyer miles upon card approval and qualifying spend
useCaseSummary: The premium KrisFlyer Amex card with lounge access and hotel stays — best for SIA loyalists who want status benefits and airport perks alongside their miles earning.

name: American Express Platinum Credit Card
perks: 2X Membership Rewards on dining and travel
Points transfer to multiple airlines and hotels
Amex Experiences and Fine Hotels & Resorts access
welcomeBonus: Bonus Membership Rewards points on qualifying spend in first 3 months
useCaseSummary: A flexible Amex points card with strong dining and travel earn rates and a broad range of transfer partners — great for those who want optionality across airlines and hotels.

name: American Express CapitaCard
perks: 1X STAR$ on all other retail spend
Exclusive CapitaMall dining deals and privileges
welcomeBonus: Bonus STAR$ on first spend at CapitaMalls
useCaseSummary: Best for frequent CapitaMall shoppers and diners — earning CapitaStar points redeemable as shopping vouchers across 15+ malls in Singapore.

name: BOC Family Card
welcomeBonus: Check BOC website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: A straightforward family card with 10% back on the two biggest household spend categories — dining and groceries — making it ideal for families with regular supermarket and hawker spending.

name: BOC Elite Miles World Mastercard
perks: 1.5 mpd local, 3 mpd overseas and online travel
Transfer to KrisFlyer and other frequent flyer programmes
welcomeBonus: Check BOC website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: BOC's flagship miles card with a competitive 3 mpd on overseas spend. A solid option for travellers who want miles earning on a Mastercard with no minimum spend.

name: BOC Sheng Siong Card
welcomeBonus: Check BOC website for current welcome offer
useCaseSummary: The definitive card for Sheng Siong shoppers — earns 8% cashback at all Sheng Siong outlets with no annual fee, making it a cost-free grocery savings tool.
